text: dad!! okay i actually went to the campus gym THREE times this week 😭 destiny said she doesn't even believe i'm real anymore lol
Three times! I'm telling your mother - she said you'd quit by February 😄 Proud of you, Nicole.
she was NOT wrong historically but this time is different i swear lol. also have you talked to Nana? she's not picking up when i call
She's fine, phone died again, you know how she is. She keeps asking when you're coming to visit - says Nashville must be keeping you too busy for her.
tell her i'll call Sunday for real this time!! and maybe i come summer break? the library's been wild but i miss her fr
